methods.description: Process for collecting and processing speleothem samples from cave sites for DNA extraction and analysis.

steps.description: Samples were collected in February, 2009, from five sites in the cave system.
steps.searchable_summary: collect speleothem samples from cave sites

steps.description: Speleothems were sampled using the swab method with sterilized tap water and swabbed area of 20 cm².
steps.searchable_summary: swab speleothem samples with sterilized water

steps.description: Samples were homogenized by vortexing for one minute.
1 mL was removed for sample plating and 3 mL was subjected to community DNA extraction.
steps.searchable_summary: partition samples for plating and DNA extraction

methods.method_name: Identification of Non-sporulating Isolates and Phylogenetic Analysis
methods.description: Procedure for identifying non-sporulating isolates using ITS region sequencing and phylogenetic analysis.

steps.description: Successfully amplified ITS regions were sequenced at the University of Arizona Genetics Core.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence ITS regions at genetics core

steps.description: Individual sequences were queried against the NCBI 'nr' sequence database using BLAST.
steps.searchable_summary: perform BLAST search on ITS sequences

steps.description: Tentative identification was assigned if 75% of the top 20 BLAST hits favored a particular genus.
steps.searchable_summary: assign tentative genus identification based on BLAST hits

steps.description: MTUs were examined within a phylogenetic context by placing them into a reference tree.
steps.searchable_summary: place MTUs into phylogenetic reference tree

steps.description: Resulting matrices were aligned using ClustalW and edited using Mesquite.
A heuristic parsimony search was conducted using PAUP with TBR branch swapping algorithm.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct heuristic parsimony search with PAUP

steps.description: A full heuristic bootstrap search was conducted to obtain support values.
steps.searchable_summary: perform bootstrap search for support values

methods.description: Method for confirming genetic taxonomic units (GTUs) and performing phylogenetic analysis based on ITS region sequencing.

steps.description: BLAST searches of sporulating GTUs against NCBI databases confirmed genus identifications.
steps.searchable_summary: confirm genus identifications with BLAST search

steps.description: Non-sporulating MTUs were resolved into GTUs and tentatively identified as members of fungal genera.
Both sporulating and non-sporulating MTUs were placed into reference sequence matrices.
steps.searchable_summary: place MTUs into reference sequence matrices
